sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18778" key="a)xrhmone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀχρημ-ονέω</orth>, <sense id="n18778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in want of money,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
